levels.name: Beginner
levels.description: Can understand and use basic expressions.

levels.name: Intermediate
levels.description: Can deal with most travel situations.

levels.name: Upper-Intermediate
levels.description: Can interact with fluency and spontaneity.

levels.name: Advanced
levels.description: Can use language flexibly and effectively.

levels.name: Mastery
levels.description: Can express precisely in complex situations.
